query_title: Return of the Living Dead: Rave to the Grave

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of survivors take refuge in a shopping mall after the world is taken over by aggressive, flesh-eating zombies.

recommendations.title: Lake Placid 2
recommendations.overview: Man-eating crocodiles return to the lake as two males and one aggressive female crocodile, which is protecting her nest, wreak havoc on the locals.

recommendations.title: Rape Zombie: Lust of the Dead 2
recommendations.overview: A strange virus turns 90% of the world population into Lust eating Zombies. However, in Akihabara, Japan, some males were found to be uninfected. These men team up with the Zombies to go after the flesh and blood of surviving young women to fill thei

recommendations.title: Return of the Living Dead: Necropolis
recommendations.overview: In an attempt to rescue their friend from an evil corporation, a group of teenagers end up releasing a horde of bloodthirsty zombies.

recommendations.title: Trick
recommendations.overview: A detective tries to track down a masked killer who reappears every Halloween to wreak bloody havoc.

recommendations.title: The Girl with All the Gifts
recommendations.overview: In the future, a strange fungus has changed nearly everyone into thoughtless, flesh-eating monsters. When a scientist and a teacher find a girl who seems to be immune to the fungus, they all begin a journey to save humanity.

recommendations.title: Dabangg 2
recommendations.overview: Chulbul Pandey invites a fresh trouble when he kills the brother of a notorious politician and the former swears to wreak havoc in his life.

recommendations.title: Parasyte: Part 2
recommendations.overview: Humanity is under attack by human-mimicking flesh-eating alien parasites. One parasite bonds with his young high school student host, and he convinces the parasite to help him stop the others.

recommendations.title: Insanitarium
recommendations.overview: After he's institutionalized in order to cover for his sister, a young man encounters a doctor who is turning his patients into flesh-eating psychopaths.

recommendations.title: Slumber Party Massacre II
recommendations.overview: Courtney is tormented by dreams of the infamous Driller Killer returning to wreak havoc... only to find that the murderous monster is reincarnated as an evil rocker.
